I couldn't find any information on a plant called "Joniris tenax." However, I found information on the plant "Juniperus tenax". 

Juniperus tenax, also known as Rocky Mountain juniper, is a type of evergreen coniferous tree native to North America. The health benefits of Juniperus tenax include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, urinary tract infections, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Juniperus tenax include terpenes, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Juniperus tenax include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions.
